ShortDescription.Value: Modify building properties to your heart's content (within limits).

Publish.LongDescription:
Beta, debug build.
Download only for testing.
Mod data will not be compatible with final release.
What can be done: - Randomize building's pseudo-random properties (per building instance) - Change brands on buildings (per building instance) - Override approved component data (per save) - Options to reset/backup/restore from Options menu - Create Static Ploppable variants of any buildings in-game
Provide feedback in https://discord.com/channels/1024242828114673724/1393652142731956390
